### Post by efexorce on 2015-10-08
Hi.
My network is like this
(Modem)->(Proxy Server)->(Clients)

This configuration is blocking adult web sites by Dansguardian
But also other web sites are being blocked by squid
[PHP]
# Generated by iptables-save v1.4.21 on Thu Oct  8 11:41:36 2015
*nat
:PREROUTING ACCEPT [30:1904]
:INPUT ACCEPT [55:3204]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [115:7837]
:POSTROUTING ACCEPT [49:2940]
-A PREROUTING -p tcp -m tcp --dport 80 -j REDIRECT --to-ports 8080
-A POSTROUTING -o eth0 -j MASQUERADE
COMMIT
# Completed on Thu Oct  8 11:41:36 2015
# Generated by iptables-save v1.4.21 on Thu Oct  8 11:41:36 2015
*mangle
:PREROUTING ACCEPT [2491:1156577]
:INPUT ACCEPT [1915:930715]
:FORWARD ACCEPT [576:225862]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [1932:1159901]
:POSTROUTING ACCEPT [2508:1385763]
COMMIT
# Completed on Thu Oct  8 11:41:36 2015

[/PHP]

if i change 
"-A PREROUTING -p tcp -m tcp --dport 80 -j REDIRECT --to-ports 8080" to
"-A PREROUTING -p tcp -m tcp --dport 80 -j REDIRECT --to-ports 3128" 
you can surf internet without any restriction.

Here is some configurations:
/etc/squid3/squid.conf
[PHP]acl localnet src 192.168.0.0/24    # RFC1918 possible internal network
acl SSL_ports port 443
acl Safe_ports port 67 # DHCP
acl Safe_ports port 53 # dns
acl Safe_ports port 80 # http
acl Safe_ports port 21 # ftp
acl Safe_ports port 443 # https
acl Safe_ports port 70 # gopher
acl Safe_ports port 210 # wais
acl Safe_ports port 1025-65535 # unregistered ports
acl Safe_ports port 280 # http-mgmt
acl Safe_ports port 488 # gss-http
acl Safe_ports port 591 # filemaker
acl Safe_ports port 777 # multiling http
acl CONNECT method CONNECT
http_access deny !Safe_ports
http_access deny CONNECT !SSL_ports
http_access allow localhost manager
http_access deny manager
http_access allow localnet
http_access allow localhost
http_access deny all
http_port 3128 transparent
coredump_dir /var/spool/squid3
refresh_pattern ^ftp:        1440    20%    10080
refresh_pattern ^gopher:    1440    0%    1440
refresh_pattern -i (/cgi-bin/|\?) 0    0%    0
refresh_pattern (Release|Packages(.gz)*)$      0       20%     2880
refresh_pattern .        0    20%    4320
cache_effective_user proxy
visible_hostname proxy
delay_pools 0
dns_nameservers 192.168.2.1 
cache_effective_group proxy

[/PHP]


/etc/dansguardian/dansguardian.conf
[PHP]contentscannertimeout = 60
contentscanexceptions = off
recheckreplacedurls = off
forwardedfor = on
usexforwardedfor = on
logconnectionhandlingerrors = on
logchildprocesshandling = off
maxchildren = 120
minchildren = 8
minsparechildren = 4
preforkchildren = 6
maxsparechildren = 32
maxagechildren = 500
maxips = 0
ipcfilename = '/tmp/.dguardianipc'
urlipcfilename = '/tmp/.dguardianurlipc'
ipipcfilename = '/tmp/.dguardianipipc'
nodaemon = off
nologger = off
logadblocks = off
loguseragent = off
daemonuser = 'proxy'
daemongroup = 'proxy'
softrestart = off
mailer = '/usr/sbin/sendmail -t'

[/PHP]


by the way Ufw disable

i am searching an appropriate [COLOR=#ff0000]iptable configuration [/COLOR]
Then, i think i can fix by iptable-restore

### Post by efexorce on 2015-10-08
```
SQUIDBOX="192.168.2.1"
DGPORT="8080"
WAN_IFACE="eth0"
LAN_IFACE="eth1"
LAN="192.168.2.0/27"

iptables -t nat -A PREROUTING -p TCP -i $LAN_IFACE -d ! $SQUIDBOX \
--dport 80 -j REDIRECT --to-ports $DGPORT

iptables -A INPUT -m state --state RELATED,ESTABLISHED -j ACCEPT

iptables -A INPUT -i lo -j ACCEPT

iptables -A INPUT -p TCP -i $LAN_IFACE -s $LAN --dport $DGPORT \
-m state --state NEW -j ACCEPT

iptables -A FORWARD -m state --state RELATED,ESTABLISHED -j ACCEPT

iptables -A FORWARD -i $LAN_IFACE -s $LAN -o $WAN_IFACE \
-m state --state NEW -j ACCEPT

iptables -t nat -A POSTROUTING -o $WAN_IFACE -j MASQUERADE
```

i tried this but no change.



i saved this configuration to /etc/iptables.up.rules.deneme1
